repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #91193 in place for the Clownfish automerge loop by refreshing it onto current main if needed, preserving the narrow Commander rawArgs documentation/test mitigation, and requesting a fresh ClawSweeper review on the repaired head.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(cli): document Commander rawArgs internal dependency
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- refresh the opted-in contributor branch for #91193 onto current main if needed
- keep the narrow documentation comment for Commander's internal rawArgs dependency
- keep or repair the action-reparse regression coverage without expanding scope into the broader runtime-warning approach from #88085

## Linked refs
- Closes #83893
- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/91193
- Related broader candidate: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88085

## Credit
This is a Clownfish repair of the contributor branch for #91193. Preserve attribution for @whiteyzy and the existing commits by @secooond.

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run src/cli/program/action-reparse.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- fresh ClawSweeper review on the exact repaired head before final router action
credit_notes: Repair source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/91193 in place because maintainer_can_modify is true.
Preserve contributor credit for @whiteyzy and the existing commits by @secooond on #91193.
Mention #83893 as the linked root issue and #88085 as a related competing broader candidate in any repair summary.
